title: Finding products with the search and filter function
workflow_title: Finding products with the search and filter function
source: support.dish.co official article (Finding products with search and filter)

steps.caption: In DISH POS you can search for an article by going to Articles, then Products to open the product overview.
To search for an article, enter the name or part of the name in the Type to search field, followed by Enter.
This displays all products that meet the search criteria.
You can also search within a product group. At Product group, click the dropdown menu, where the default is All.
Select the groups that you want to filter. Only the items in that product group will then be displayed.
To filter on a particular price, tax, name, article group and/or turnover group, click on Filter at the top right.
Enter the criteria you want to filter on. You can use several filters simultaneously, then click Apply filters at the bottom right.
All articles that meet the criteria are then displayed. To delete filters, click the cross next to a filter, or open Filter and choose Delete all filters.
